title: Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: While some European countries said they were discussing ways to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, several rejected President Trump’s calls to send warships.
summary_public: While some European countries said they were discussing ways to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, several rejected President Trump’s calls to send warships.
